value.body:
## Context

Agents currently infer available tools from the chat environment. Cycle should provide an explicit capability inventory so ticket execution can be reproducible and diagnosable.

## Outcome

Each agent run receives a typed snapshot of available Cycle MCP tools, connector capabilities, local sandbox permissions, network policy, approval mode, user profile, repository status, and provider limits.

## Acceptance criteria

- Backend exposes capability inventory for the current runtime and repository.
- Agent task records persist the capability snapshot used for the run.
- UI shows unavailable/misconfigured capabilities before assignment where possible.
- MCP/connector availability changes are reflected in diagnostics and future runs.
- Tests cover capability serialization, redaction, and provider-specific differences.

frontmatter.title: Expose runtime tool, MCP, connector, and approval capabilities to agents

value.title: Expose runtime tool, MCP, connector, and approval capabilities to agents
